present_apps.name: Yotpo Reviews
present_apps.notes: 4.6 stars with 5,239+ total reviews across products. Active review management with store owner responses. Widget configured with search, filters, and topic tags.

present_apps.name: Klaviyo
present_apps.notes: Email capture popup active ('Win a free bag of litter!'). However, the popup is intrusive on mobile -- covers entire viewport, triggers mid-scroll, and reappears after dismissal. Company ID: HBtDPh.

present_apps.name: ReCharge Subscriptions
present_apps.notes: Detected in page source (rechargepayments.com). Powers the Subscribe & Save flow on PDP with multiple delivery options (10lb monthly, 20lb bimonthly, 40lb quarterly). Well-integrated with the custom product configurator.

present_apps.name: Gorgias
present_apps.notes: Detected in page source (gorgias.chat). No visible chat widget on mobile during testing -- may be configured for specific pages or business hours only.

present_apps.name: Microsoft Clarity
present_apps.notes: Active tracking (clarity.ms, project ID: puc0w8xl0n). Provides session recordings and heatmaps for UX insights.

present_apps.name: Google Tag Manager
present_apps.notes: GTM container active (GTM-T56CXDN). Manages multiple tracking scripts.

present_apps.name: Google Analytics 4
present_apps.notes: Two GA4 properties detected: G-B61K93NBE6 (primary) and GT-TNHG2RVF. Also a G-000000 placeholder tag that should be removed.

present_apps.name: Facebook Pixel
present_apps.notes: Active pixel (ID: 2385575601730303). Facebook domain verification configured. Tracks standard e-commerce events.

present_apps.name: TikTok Pixel
present_apps.notes: Active pixel (SDK ID: CI9NSSBC77U0O25FC4F0). Tracks events via analytics.tiktok.com.

present_apps.name: Triple Whale
present_apps.notes: Active pixel detected via triplewhale-pixel.web.app and whale.camera domain. Provides multi-touch attribution for ad spend optimization.

present_apps.name: Pinterest Tag
present_apps.notes: Pinterest domain verification configured (p:domain_verify meta tag). Pinterest tracking tag detected in page source.

present_apps.name: Hotjar
present_apps.notes: Detected in page source alongside Microsoft Clarity. Running both Hotjar and Clarity is redundant -- they serve the same purpose (session recordings + heatmaps) and add unnecessary script weight.

present_apps.name: Lucky Orange
present_apps.notes: Detected in page source. This is a THIRD heatmap/session recording tool alongside Clarity and Hotjar. Major redundancy that adds unnecessary JavaScript and impacts page performance.

present_apps.name: Globo Form Builder
present_apps.notes: Detected via Shopify extension (globo.formbuilder). Used for contact forms and potentially the retailer application form.

present_apps.name: Axon (Lifetimely)
present_apps.notes: Detected via Shopify extension (axon-shop-integration). Provides customer lifetime value analytics and cohort analysis.

missing_apps.name: Loyalty / Rewards Program
missing_apps.benchmark: Smile.io or LoyaltyLion -- reward points for purchases, referrals, and social shares. Critical for a subscription brand to reduce churn and reward long-term customers.

missing_apps.name: Wishlist / Favorites
missing_apps.benchmark: Wishlist Plus or Swym -- allow customers to save products for later. Less critical for a single-product-category brand but useful as the catalog expands.

missing_apps.name: A/B Testing
missing_apps.impact_label: Data-driven optimization can improve conversion by 10-20% over time
missing_apps.benchmark: Google Optimize (free), VWO, or Convert -- essential for testing subscription vs one-time messaging, hero headlines, CTA copy, and pricing presentation.

missing_apps.name: Back-in-Stock Notifications
missing_apps.impact_label: Recover 5-10% of lost sales from stockouts
missing_apps.benchmark: Back In Stock by Swym or Klaviyo's built-in back-in-stock flow -- capture email when items are unavailable and auto-notify when restocked.

missing_apps.name: Post-Purchase Upsell
missing_apps.impact_label: Increase AOV by 10-15% via thank-you page offers
missing_apps.benchmark: ReConvert or AfterSell -- post-purchase upsells for complementary products (waste bags, scoop, litter mat) on the thank-you page. Low friction since payment info is already captured.

redundancies.recommendation: Keep Microsoft Clarity (free, owned by Microsoft, lightweight) and remove Hotjar and Lucky Orange. Running 3 session recording tools is unnecessary and adds ~200KB+ of JavaScript. Estimated savings: $30-60/month in app costs plus measurable PageSpeed improvement.
Remove the G-000000 placeholder GA4 tag. It generates unnecessary network requests and may cause data quality issues.

benchmark_context: Catalyst Pet has a mature app stack (15 apps detected) with strong coverage across reviews (Yotpo), email marketing (Klaviyo), subscriptions (ReCharge), support (Gorgias), and multi-channel advertising (FB, TikTok, Pinterest, Triple Whale). The main concern is triple-redundancy in analytics (Clarity + Hotjar + Lucky Orange) which impacts page performance. The stack is appropriate for a Tier 2-3 D2C subscription brand with estimated monthly app spend of $400-600.
narrative: Catalyst Pet's app ecosystem is well-established for a subscription-first D2C brand. The core stack of Yotpo (reviews) + Klaviyo (email) + ReCharge (subscriptions) + Gorgias (support) covers the essential customer lifecycle touchpoints. Multi-channel advertising is well-instrumented with Facebook Pixel, TikTok Pixel, Pinterest Tag, and Triple Whale for attribution. The critical issue is triple-redundancy in heatmap/session recording tools: Microsoft Clarity (free), Hotjar, and Lucky Orange all serve the same purpose. Removing two of these would save $30-60/month and reduce JavaScript bloat by ~200KB. Key missing capabilities include a loyalty/rewards program (important for reducing subscription churn), post-purchase upsells (to increase AOV on complementary products like waste bags), and A/B testing (essential for optimizing the subscription vs one-time messaging). Overall, the app infrastructure is solid but could be streamlined for better performance.
